MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Community Housing Partnership is present. Represented by Charles Byrd.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant James Cass is present.
Attorney John Weinstein representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnick, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of JAN-07-2013 is vacated.
